title: Post-028 Narrow Application-Source Trial Planning
objective: Plan the next bounded non-runtime application-source or test-only host trial after Packet 028 restored Packet 026 and Packet 027 authority parity on `/home/olares/code/apex`, without executing the trial or approving migration.
dependency_note: Packet 028 restored authority parity for Packet 026 and Packet 027 on the prepared host mirror. Packet 027 advanced the workstation-migration lane only to narrow application-source-trial-ready, not migration-ready. Packet 029 is planning only and must decide the next bounded trial shape before any source or test execution opens.
required_inputs: Current host mirror branch, commit, remote, and cleanliness evidence
constrained_outputs: A dated planning handoff selecting one bounded non-runtime application-source or test-only target surface, or explicitly deferring execution if blockers dominate
A validation and rollback plan for the selected target before any execution packet opens
A clear decision on whether the unresolved remote-moved condition or host-side executable validation gap must be handled before execution

No source edit, runtime mutation, service change, install work, package or lockfile change, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, AI-services rollout, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, or old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Verify Packet 028 closed with `/home/olares/code/apex` clean at the published authority commit.
Verify Packet 027 did not approve migration and limited the lane to narrow application-source-trial-ready.
Assess candidate target surfaces without editing them.
Select one bounded non-runtime source or test-only trial target, or defer execution with named blockers.
Define validation, rollback, publication, and host/workstation split handling before execution.
Keep runtime, services, installs, package files, lockfiles, remotes, AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, canonical-hosting, force/reset/clean, and the old clone out of scope.
sql_permission_note: This planning packet authorizes no database writes. It also authorizes no runtime mutation, service changes, install work, package changes, source edits, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Completed on 2026-05-04. Verified Packet 028 authority parity, confirmed `/home/olares/code/apex` clean at `9690d1d93136e74b3ee12b4427fc8c6a25c5e0ce`, preserved `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`, selected the `apps/operations-web` relay browser selection reset surface as the next bounded production-source trial, and concluded Packet 030 authority publication/resync must occur before execution.
next_action: Open only Packet 030 as the bounded Packet 028 and Packet 029 authority publication and host-mirror resync gate. Do not use Packet 029 closure as migration approval, runtime authorization, service authorization, install authorization, source-edit execution authorization, remote-rewrite authorization, force/reset/clean authorization, or old-clone mutation authorization.
